overview.title: MAS OMEGA - DM Conversion Mapping Specification

revisions.author: Kevin Chan
revisions.remark: Included mapping for Issuance Calendar, Issuance Announcement & Bid Collation Modules.

revisions.description: Schema reconciliation against current dict.json + bug fixes from v0.01 source
revisions.author: Kevin Chan
revisions.remark: Applied D7 (sec.* folded into iss.*); added universal noise rows; rewrote BIDCOL-001/003 against post-refactor schema; fixed source bugs in v0.01 (banner typos, Oracle datatype leaks, etc.). New cm/iss modules to follow in subsequent revisions.

signoff.name:
Kevin Chan (Data Migration Engineer)
Lim Wee Kiang (Solution Architect)

migrationSummary.filter: To migrate record with MAX(ABA0001_ISSUE_NO). There will only be one record per security_code.
To migrate record via composite key (ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE, ABA0001_ISSUE_NO)
To migrate one record per year extracted from ABA0021_ISSUE_DATETIME
To migrate one record per year extracted from ABA0121_ISSUE_DATETIME
To migrate record linked to iss_calendar_listing_uuid via year
To migrate record linked to iss_calendar_listing_uuid via year

migrationSummary.dependency: Must run after MAS-OMEGA-ISSCAL-003/004 and MAS-OMEGA-SECMST-002
migrationSummary.filter: To migrate record via composite key (ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE, ABA0001_ISSUE_NO)
To migrate via unique composite key (ABA0004_BANK_REF_NO + ABA0004_RECEIVED_DATE + ABA0004_FILE_TYPE)
To migrate records where ABA0007_TYPE_OF_APPLN is not 'IND'

MAS-OMEGA-SECMST-001: Generate UUID: Create a unique UUID for every distinct SECURITY_CODE.
This is to migrate per security code; multiple issuances with different issue_no will be migrated to iss.iss_issuance.

Transformation:

SELECT DISTINCT ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE

IF duplicates exist (due to multiple Issue Nos) -> SELECT record with MAX(ABA0001_ISSUE_NO)
To migrate the most recent security code details.
Width tightened from v0.01 VARCHAR(50) to current dict VARCHAR(30).

Transformation:

IF Starts with 'BA' -> 'SECTYPE_CMTB'
IF Starts with 'B' (and not 'BA') -> 'SECTYPE_TBILL'
IF Starts with 'N' -> 'SECTYPE_SGS'
IF Starts with 'M1' -> 'SECTYPE_MAS_FRN'
IF Starts with 'M' (and not 'M1') -> 'SECTYPE_MASBILL'
To map security type based on security code prefix.

Transformation:

IF Starts with 'N' AND 4th last char is '2' -> 'SGSTYPE_INFRA'
IF Starts with 'N' AND 4th last char is '3' -> 'SGSTYPE_GREEN_INFRA'
IF Starts with 'N' (and 4th last char not '2' or '3') -> 'SGSTYPE_MD'
To derive specific SGS Type based on legacy naming conventions. Width widened from v0.01 VARCHAR(20) to current dict VARCHAR(50).

Transformation:

IF SECURITY_CODE Starts with 'N' -> 'SEMI_ANNUAL'
IF SECURITY_CODE Starts with 'M1' -> 'SEMI_ANNUAL'
ELSE -> 'AT_MATURITY'
To derive coupon payment frequency based on Security Type. Width widened from v0.01 VARCHAR(20) to current dict VARCHAR(50).
Default map to migration run timestamp
Map to same value as created_dt
MAS-OMEGA-SECMST-002: Generate UUID: Create a new UUID for every unique combination of SECURITY_CODE + ISSUE_NO.
Primary Key for OMEGA Issuance table.
Lookup: Query iss.iss_security_master.uuid where security_code matches ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE.
Mandatory Foreign Key. Ensure Security Master is migrated first. (Renamed from sec_security_master_uuid under D7.)

Transformation:

WHEN ABA0001_TENDER_DATE < ABA0001_ANNOUNCE_DATE THEN 'ISSTYPE_SYNDICATION'
ELSE 'ISSTYPE_AUCTION'
To determine issuance_type = 'ISSTYPE_SYNDICATION' based on condition (TENDER_DATE < ANNOUNCE_DATE).
Any ABA0001_ISSUE_NO > 1 indicates a reopen issue.
For Syndication, will provide the mapping in next revision.
For Syndication, will provide the mapping in next revision.
For Syndication, will provide the mapping in next revision.
Derived from submission end at run time.
Width tightened from v0.01 NUMERIC(20,2) to current dict NUMERIC(13,0).
Hardcoded in legacy system as 1000 for SGS Bonds/T-Bills/MAS-Bills; propose default 1000.
ABA0001 lacks an explicit Total Allotted column. Use ABA0504_TOT_AMT_ALLOTED if available.
Precision tightened from v0.01 NUMERIC(5,2) to current dict NUMERIC(4,2).
Renamed from v0.01 bid_to_cover_ratio to current dict subscription_pct.

Possible values are
'Y' - Year
'M' - Month
'D' - Day
Populated only for syndications; not applicable to legacy auctions.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Derived at auction run time; not in legacy.
Default map to migration run timestamp
Map to same value as created_dt
MAS-OMEGA-ISSCAL-001: Generate UUID: Create a unique UUID for every distinct (year + security_type).
Primary Key for OMEGA Calendar Listing table.
To select distinct and map to year extracted from Issue Datetime.
There should only be one record migrated per year.
The issue calendar publication date is stored as part of audit table under ABA0023_AUDIT_ACTION; propose to map this to NULL for migrated records.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.

Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Default map to migration run timestamp
Map to same value as created_dt

Primary Key for OMEGA Calendar Listing table.
To select distinct and map to year extracted from Issue Datetime.

MAS-OMEGA-ISSCAL-003: Generate UUID: Create a new UUID for every (security_code + issue_no) row.
Primary Key for OMEGA Calendar Data table.
Lookup UUID from iss.iss_calendar_listing where year = extracted Source Year and security_type matches Source logic.
Mandatory linkage to Parent Listing table.
Replaced by number of issuances in iss.iss_issuance tied under same iss_security_master_uuid.

Transformation:

IF 'B' -> 'SGSTYPE_MD'
IF 'I' -> 'SGSTYPE_INFRA'
IF 'G' -> 'SGSTYPE_GREEN_INFRA'
IF 'T' -> NULL

Transformation:

Lookup from iss.iss_issuance using composite key (ABA0021_SECURITY_CODE, ABA0021_ISSUE_NO)

IF iss.iss_issuance.issuance_type = 'ISSTYPE_SYNDICATION' -> 'ISSTYPE_SYNDICATION'
ELSE -> 'ISSTYPE_AUCTION'
Renamed from v0.01 tenor_value to current dict tenor.

Possible values are
'Y' - Year
'M' - Month
'D' - Day
Not applicable in legacy ABA0021 (lookup via iss_issuance.maturity_dt at runtime if needed).
Syndication-only; not applicable to legacy auctions.
Syndication-only; not applicable to legacy auctions.
Syndication-only; not applicable to legacy auctions.
Syndication-only; not applicable to legacy auctions.
Syndication-only; not applicable to legacy auctions.
Derived from auction_dt at runtime; not applicable to legacy.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Legacy records have actual (not provisioned) ISIN codes.
TBD: optionally derive from ABA0001_BENCHMARK_IND via iss_issuance lookup.
Default map to migration run timestamp
Map to same value as created_dt
MAS-OMEGA-ISSCAL-004: Generate UUID: Create a new UUID for every (security_code + issue_no) row.
Primary Key for OMEGA Calendar Data table.
Lookup UUID from iss.iss_calendar_listing where year = extracted Source Year and security_type = 'SECTYPE_SSB'.
Mandatory linkage to Parent Listing table.
Replaced by number of issuances in iss.iss_issuance tied under same iss_security_master_uuid.
All records in this source table are Savings Bonds.
Renamed from v0.01 tenor_value to current dict tenor.

Possible values are
'Y' - Year
'M' - Month
'D' - Day

Transformation:

Lookup from ABA0101_SB_SECURITY_MASTER using composite key (ABA0121_SECURITY_CODE, ABA0121_ISSUE_NO)

Result -> ABA0101_TENDER_DATE
Lookup ABA0101_SB_SECURITY_MASTER if needed at runtime.
Not applicable in legacy SBA system.
Legacy records have actual (not provisioned) ISIN codes.
Default map to migration run timestamp
Map to same value as created_dt
MAS-OMEGA-ISSANN-001: Generate UUID: Create a new UUID for every (security_code + issue_no) announcement row.
Primary Key for OMEGA Announcement Details table.
Lookup UUID from iss.iss_calendar_data where security_code matches composite key (ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE + ABA0001_ISSUE_NO).
Lookup UUID from iss.iss_issuance where security_code matches composite key (ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE + ABA0001_ISSUE_NO).

Transformation:

IF Starts with 'BA' -> 'SECTYPE_CMTB'
IF Starts with 'B' (and not 'BA') -> 'SECTYPE_TBILL'
IF Starts with 'N' -> 'SECTYPE_SGS'
IF Starts with 'M1' -> 'SECTYPE_MAS_FRN'
IF Starts with 'M' (and not 'M1') -> 'SECTYPE_MASBILL'
Same security_type prefix logic as SECMST-002.

Transformation:

WHEN ABA0001_TENDER_DATE < ABA0001_ANNOUNCE_DATE THEN 'ISSTYPE_SYNDICATION'
ELSE 'ISSTYPE_AUCTION'
Lookup iss.iss_calendar_data via iss_calendar_data_uuid established to map to sgs_type.
Any ABA0001_ISSUE_NO > 1 indicates a reopen issue.
Renamed from v0.01 tenor_value to current dict tenor.

Possible values are

'M' - Month
'D' - Day

Renamed from v0.01 mas_intended_tender_amount to current dict mas_intended_tender_amt.

Transformation:

Format ABA0001_INTEREST_RATE as fixed-point string (e.g. TO_CHAR(rate, 'FM0.0000'))
TBD: confirm format with FSD; placeholder formats coupon_rate as fixed-point string (e.g. '2.7500'). Type flipped from v0.01 NUMERIC(7,4) to current dict VARCHAR(100).

Footnotes are currently stored as config in legacy eApps system; to discuss and decide whether to migrate footnotes for legacy records. Renamed from v0.01 footnotes to current dict announcement_footnotes.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Default map to migration run timestamp
Map to same value as created_dt
MAS-OMEGA-BIDCOL-001: Generate UUID: Create a new UUID for every retail bid record (TYPE_OF_APPLN = 'IND').
Primary Key for OMEGA Retail Bid table.
Lookup iss.iss_issuance.uuid where security_code matches ABA0007_SECURITY_CODE and ABA0007_ISSUE_NO.
Mandatory linkage. Ensure iss_issuance is migrated first.
Lookup cm.cm_counterparty.uuid where bank_code matches ABA0007_PRI_DLR_CODE.
Renamed from v0.01 cm_bank_master_uuid to current dict cm_counterparty_uuid.

To assign a grouping submission_ref_uuid using identifier below

(SUBSTR(ABA0007_BANK_REF_NO, 1, 4) + ABA0007_TENDER_DATE)
Used to group retail bids under a unique Submission ID. Renamed from v0.01 submission_ref_uuid (BIDCOL-002 row 1).

Propose to skip physical file migration as legacy interface bids are stored in ABA0005_RSA_TEXT_ENC_TRANS / ABA0035_RETAILBID_FILE; OMEGA stores files in S3 and bids are extracted into staging tables. Renamed from v0.01 iss_bid_file_registry_uuid.
Not applicable to legacy eApps schema. Renamed from v0.01 iss_allotment_run_uuid.
TBD: confirm default constant for migrated retail bids (likely ROLEGRP_RETAIL).
TBD: width tightened from v0.01 VARCHAR(16) to current dict VARCHAR(8); source is VARCHAR2(12), confirm length policy and risk of truncation.
Width aligned with source VARCHAR2(14); v0.01 had VARCHAR(20).
Transformed into OMEGA specific mastercode. Renamed from v0.01 nationality_code.
TBD: confirm whether nation_code receives the raw S/P/F or a mastercode.
Only populated if Application Type is CASH.
Only populated if Application Type is CPFIS/SRS.
Only records with ABA0007_TYPE_OF_APPLN = 'IND' will be inserted into iss.iss_bid_retail.
Transformed into OMEGA specific mastercode. Folded in from v0.01 BIDCOL-002 row 2.
Only submission types with ABA0007_TYPE_OF_APPLN = 'IND' will be pushed into iss.iss_bid_retail.
Raw custody bank code from legacy.
Renamed from v0.01 bid_yield to current dict yield_pct.
This is the amount calculated for auction run purposes; propose to keep NULL for legacy migrated records.
Width widened from v0.01 NUMERIC(13,0) to current dict NUMERIC(17,2). Oracle leak fixed.

Transformation:

Extract and merge ABA0004_RECEIVED_DATE + ABA0004_RECEIVED_TIME
Folded in from v0.01 BIDCOL-002 row 3.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.
Not applicable in legacy eApps system.

MAS-OMEGA-BIDCOL-002:
To assign a grouping submission_ref_uuid using identifier below

(SUBSTR(ABA0004_BANK_REF_NO, 1, 4) + ABA0004_RECEIVED_DATE + ABA0004_FILE_TYPE)

Used to group bids under a unique Submission ID (Batch). 2nd-pass update against iss.iss_bid_retail to link retail bid rows already migrated by BIDCOL-001 to their submission-group UUID. Renamed from v0.01 submission_ref_uuid.
2nd-pass update. Transformed into OMEGA specific mastercode.

Transformation:

Extract and merge ABA0004_RECEIVED_DATE + ABA0004_RECEIVED_TIME
MAS-OMEGA-BIDCOL-003: Generate UUID: Create a new UUID for every institutional bid record (TYPE_OF_APPLN <> 'IND').
Primary Key for OMEGA Institutional Bid table.
Lookup iss.iss_issuance.uuid where security_code matches ABA0007_SECURITY_CODE and ABA0007_ISSUE_NO.
Mandatory linkage. Ensure iss_issuance is migrated first.
Lookup cm.cm_counterparty.uuid where bank_code matches ABA0007_PRI_DLR_CODE.
Renamed from v0.01 cm_bank_master_uuid to current dict cm_counterparty_uuid.

To assign a grouping submission_ref_uuid using identifier below

(SUBSTR(ABA0007_BANK_REF_NO, 1, 4) + ABA0007_TENDER_DATE)
Used to group bids under a unique Submission ID. For institutional, the Bank Ref No is unique per submission form. Renamed from v0.01 submission_ref_uuid.
Renamed from v0.01 iss_bid_file_registry_uuid; not applicable to legacy eApps schema.
Renamed from v0.01 iss_allotment_run_uuid; not applicable to legacy eApps schema.
TBD: confirm default constant for migrated institutional bids (likely ROLEGRP_INSTITUTIONAL).
TBD: width tightened from v0.01 VARCHAR(16) to current dict VARCHAR(8); source is VARCHAR2(12), confirm length policy and risk of truncation.

Transformation:

IF 'PD' -> 'APPLNTYPE_PD'
IF 'FB' -> 'APPLNTYPE_FB'
IF 'RB' -> 'APPLNTYPE_RB'
IF 'OB' -> 'APPLNTYPE_OB'
IF 'NB' -> 'APPLNTYPE_NB'
IF 'MB' -> 'APPLNTYPE_MB'
IF 'IA' -> 'APPLNTYPE_IA'
IF 'FC' -> 'APPLNTYPE_FC'
IF 'INS' -> 'APPLNTYPE_INS'
IF 'SB' -> 'APPLNTYPE_SB'
IF 'SGX' -> 'APPLNTYPE_SGX'
IF 'MAS' -> 'APPLNTYPE_MAS'
ELSE -> 'APPLNTYPE_OTH'
Only submission types where ABA0007_TYPE_OF_APPLN <> 'IND' are pushed into iss.iss_bid_institutional.

Transformed into OMEGA specific mastercode.

Only institutional bids with 'E' (Electronic/Web) or 'M' (Manual Contingency) will be migrated.
Institutional bids have no AP1/AP2/AP3 concept.
Institutional bids are by yield, not price, in legacy.
Auction-run derived; not applicable to legacy.

Receive date for institutional bids derived from TENDER_DATE.
